stories.title: Show HN: Transient – CLI Governance layer for AI agents

When an agent goes wrong the question is always the same: what did it do, was it authorised, can you prove it. Only 21% of companies have a mature governance model for autonomous agents. Every action gets a signed, tamper-evident receipt the agent can't alter.
